title: Garlicky Haddock Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring haddock fillets marinated in a garlicky mixture and grilled to perfection on skewers.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine garlic, magically infused oil, and maple syrup. Blend until smooth.
2. Place the haddock fillets in a large bowl and pour the garlicky mixture over them. Toss to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
5. Thread 2-3 haddock pieces onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the haddock is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
